title: Gap Closure, Deliberate Practice, and Honest Positioning · Claim Audit: Apply Learn Loop
summary: The role matrix exposes a few high-value gaps, but the candidate starts another broad course instead of testing whether each gap blocks real work. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the apply learn loop increment in time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Interleave bounded applications, feedback signals, retrieval, projects, and plan revision without training on random rejection noise.
Describe adjacent experience and an active learning boundary truthfully without apologizing or inflating competence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Apply Learn Loop · Theory Apply Learn Loop
steps.instruction:
theory case — Three genuine evidence gaps trigger a six-month general course plan even though only one may block the candidate’s target work. The theory variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Interleave bounded applications, feedback signals, retrieval, projects, and plan revision without training on random rejection noise.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Apply Learn Loop contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Apply Learn Loop · Theory Apply Learn Loop.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: Three genuine evidence gaps trigger a six-month general course plan even though only one may block the candidate’s target work. The worked example variation 4 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Interleave bounded applications, feedback signals, retrieval, projects, and plan revision without training on random rejection noise. A defensible solution applies Apply Learn Loop, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to time-boxed role-readiness experiment plan.

content.code:
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-5
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

content.title: Non-worked case
content.text: All application outcomes identify the exact skill gap to fix. This fails the Apply Learn Loop contract because it omits a precondition, invariant, ownership rule, or counterexample needed by this exact case.

content.value: NACE Career Readiness Competencies (Current eight-competency framework reviewed 2026-07-15) — Controls observable evidence for career and self-development, communication, critical thinking, equity and inclusion, leadership, professionalism, teamwork, and technology.

content.label: Mastery evidence
content.value: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Interleave bounded applications, feedback signals, retrieval, projects, and plan revision without training on random rejection noise.
